_comment: Expected `next build` render mode for every route, asserted by scripts/assert-route-classification.mjs after a build. Guards the conversion-track payoff (3.0.4.8+3.0.4.9): a route must not silently regress to a more dynamic mode. Modes: 'static' = O (fully prerendered), 'partial' = (partial prerender — static shell + request-time <Suspense> holes), 'dynamic' = f (server-rendered per request). New routes must be added here or the check fails. If a change is intentional, update this file in the same commit.

_reasons./: Transient auth_error query param renders in a Suspense dynamic hole; hero + tiles are static.
_reasons./sites: searchParams-driven filtered list + live-price overlay stream from a dynamic hole.
_reasons./sites/[id]: Per-site detail (params + DB + live prices) streams from a dynamic hole.
_reasons./admin: Per-user: the session-gated single-page dashboard (KPIs, status strip, traffic, users) is a request-time dynamic hole; visx charts are client-only islands inside it.
_reasons./admin/access: Per-user: session-gated admin-role management + audit is a request-time dynamic hole.
_reasons./admin/access/[userId]: Per-user: session-gated admin user detail (a user's linked characters + sessions; force-unlink / reassign / force-logout) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container prerenders.
_reasons./characters: Per-user: the session-gated character-management list (link / switch active / unlink) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell.
_reasons./industry: Industry dashboard — static shell of cached sample reads (favorites); recently-viewed hydrates client-side from localStorage; no request-time server data.
_reasons./industry/[id]: Per-blueprint planner ([id] param + cached structure/prices) streams from a dynamic hole; page chrome is the static shell.
_reasons./dev/sparkline: Unlinked dev demo of the visx sparkline primitive — static shell, no request-time data; the chart is a client-only component loaded via dynamic(ssr:false).
_reasons./skills: Per-user: the session-gated linked-character read (names, portraits, scope health) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell, and the queue data itself streams client-side over the Convex websocket (no server render-time data).
_reasons./jobs: Per-user: the session-gated linked-character read (names, portraits, scope health) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell, and the job boards stream client-side over the Convex websocket — including the scheduled flip-to-ready (no server render-time data).
_reasons./dev/sandbox: UX exploration sandbox index — admin-gated on production only; the request-time session read is a dynamic hole (so the container prerenders as a static shell), but the gate only redirects on production. Preview/dev stay open so the mockups are viewable where EVE login isn't available. Links to the gallery leaf pages.
_reasons./dev/esi: ESI scope-superset proving page (3.4.6) — production-only admin gate (the /dev/sandbox pattern): the unconditional session read + linked-character list is a request-time dynamic hole (container prerenders as the static shell); the per-endpoint read panel is a client island doing on-demand POSTs to /api/dev/esi (no polling, nothing stored).
_reasons./dev/sandbox/trees: Unlinked dev mockup gallery — static shell over a hardcoded sample build; the five tree-display variants are client-only islands.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/trees/flow: Unlinked dev flow-connector explorer — static shell; the interactive graph (blueprint switch, drill-zoom) is a client-only island over real (fixed-id) blueprint structures.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/industry: Unlinked dev mockup of the planner page (hero + hybrid build view) — static shell; structures are fixed-id cached reads, the hybrid graph is a client-only island.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/prices: Unlinked dev mockup gallery — static shell; the ten price-animation variants are client-only, driven by timers over a hardcoded sample figure.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/cards: Unlinked dev mockup gallery — static shell; the six card variants are client-only (hover/pointer effects) over hardcoded sample data.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/redesign: Unlinked dev gallery index for the site-redesign mockups — fully static, no request-time data.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/redesign/*: Four unlinked redesign mockups (home + industry landing in two candidate themes) — pure static JSX over hardcoded mock data; navs are CSS-only (details/summary + hover), no client islands.
_reasons./api/industry/blueprints: Blueprint search index is deploy-static SDE data (cached 'max', SDE-tag revalidated), so the handler prerenders to a static JSON asset — no per-request input.
_reasons./api/industry/systems: Build-system search index (systems with an industry-capable NPC station) is deploy-static SDE data (cached 'max', SDE-tag revalidated), so the handler prerenders to a static JSON asset — no per-request input. Filtered client-side by the build-location selector.
_reasons.dynamic /api/*: Route handlers — per-request by nature (auth, mutations, DB queries, crons, external calls). Justified dynamic.
